code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut has = false
mut neg = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  else if b == 45 and not has
    neg = true
  else
    if has
      if neg
        nums = list.push(nums, 0 - cur)
      else
        nums = list.push(nums, cur)
      end
      cur = 0
      has = false
      neg = false
    else
      neg = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if has
  if neg
    nums = list.push(nums, 0 - cur)
  else
    nums = list.push(nums, cur)
  end
end

let count = nums.len()
mut out = ""
mut j = count - 1
while j >= 0
  let v = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j < count - 1
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  else
    out = "#{v}"
  end
  j = j - 1
end
println(out)
